name: ecotech-pro
description: EcoTech Pro — app de gestión de residuos electrónicos (monorepo frontend + backend)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
